title: PCB Orchestrator
description: Top-level PCB design orchestrator. Plans the full workflow and delegates tasks to specialized sub-agents. Use this as the entry-point agent for any PCB design request.
context: Orchestrates: pcb-requirements → pcb-schematic → pcb-layout → pcb-drc-dfm → pcb-export. Use pcb-vision-parts for image/datasheet analysis, pcb-quality for final sign-off.
